token-generator: Generate cryptographically secure random tokens with customizable length (1–512 characters) and character sets (uppercase, lowercase, numbers, symbols). Ideal for API keys, session IDs, passwords, or any secure token needs.
hash-text: Generate secure hashes from text or files using MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA224, SHA512, SHA384, SHA3 and RIPEMD160 algorithms. Ideal for data integrity checks and password hashing.
bcrypt: Generate secure Bcrypt hashes for passwords with adjustable cost factor. Perfect for secure password storage in applications.
uuids-generator: Generate UUIDs of all versions: NIL (all-zero), v1 (time-based), v3 (name-based MD5), v4 (random), v5 (name-based SHA-1). Supports bulk generation (up to 50), custom namespaces for v3/v5.
ulid-generator: Generate Universally Unique Lexicographically Sortable Identifiers (ULID). Monotonic, time-sortable, and URL-safe alternative to UUIDs.
encrypt-decrypt-text: Encrypt and decrypt text using symmetric algorithms (AES, etc.) with custom keys and modes. Secure client-side processing.
bip39-passphrase-generator: Generate secure BIP39 mnemonic phrases (12–24 words) for cryptocurrency wallets with selectable entropy strength.
hmac-generator: Compute HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) using various hash algorithms and secret keys for message integrity and authentication.
rsa-key-pair-generator: Generate RSA public/private key pairs with selectable bit length (2048, 4096, etc.) for encryption, signing, and SSH.
password-strength-analyzer: Analyze password strength in real-time: entropy, crack time estimate, common pattern detection, and breach checks.
qr-code: Create customizable QR codes from URLs, text, emails, or vCards. Download in multiple formats with error correction and logo overlays.
wifi-qr-code: Generate scannable QR codes for WiFi networks. Supports WPA/WPA2, WEP, no password, hidden SSIDs, and enterprise WPA2-EAP configurations with custom colors and instant download.
barcode: Generate customizable barcodes in multiple formats (CODE128, EAN13, UPC, CODE39, and more). Adjust bar width, height, colors, margins, text position, font, and styling. Real-time preview with copy to clipboard and PNG download.
contact-qr-code: Generate professional QR codes containing your full contact information (vCard format). Include name, phone, email, job title, website, address, and more. Perfect for business cards, networking, and digital sharing.
qr-code-reader: Scan and decode QR codes and 1D/2D barcodes instantly from images, uploaded files, or your webcam. Extract URLs, text, contact info, Wi-Fi credentials, product info, and more with real-time results.
json-yaml: Seamlessly convert JSON to YAML and YAML to JSON with instant validation and formatting. Perfect for developers handling configuration files and data interchange.
date-time: Transform dates and timestamps between various formats, including Unix timestamps, ISO strings, and custom patterns. Ideal for debugging and API integrations.
number-base: Quickly convert numbers between binary, hexadecimal, decimal, and octal bases. Supports large numbers and real-time calculations for programmers and engineers.
cron-parser: Parse cron expressions into clear, human-readable descriptions. Supports seconds, macros (@daily, @hourly, etc.), verbose mode, 24-hour format, and detailed symbol explanations for scheduling tasks.
html: Encode or decode special characters into HTML entities to prevent XSS vulnerabilities or render formatted text safely in web content.
url: Encode URLs with percent-encoding for safe transmission or decode them back to readable text. Essential for web development and API parameter handling.
base64: Encode binary data or text to Base64 for email attachments and APIs, or decode it back effortlessly with built-in validation.
jwt: Decode JSON Web Tokens to inspect headers, payloads, and signatures without secret keys. Great for debugging authentication flows.
json: Beautify, minify, and validate JSON data in real-time. Detect errors and ensure your JSON is syntactically correct for seamless integration.
xml: Format XML documents for readability, collapse nested elements, and validate structure. Useful for XML configuration and data exchange.
sql: Format, beautify, and indent SQL queries for improved readability. Supports standard SQL syntax with customizable indentation, uppercase keywords, and line breaks.
lorem-ipsum: Produce customizable placeholder text in Latin or other languages. Specify paragraphs, words, or sentences for design mockups and prototyping.
checksum: Compute checksums for files or text to verify integrity. Supports CRC32, MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA384 and SHA512 for downloads and backups.
inspector-case-converter: Analyze text statistics like word count and character frequency, while converting between camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase, and more for clean code.
regex: Test and debug regular expressions with live matching, replacement, and syntax highlighting. Supports flags and capture groups for precise pattern validation.
text-diff: Compare two pieces of text side-by-side or inline with color-coded differences. Perfect for spotting changes in code, configs, logs, or documents with word and character-level precision.
multi-language-translator: Translate words and phrases into 11+ languages instantly. Generate ready-to-use common.json files for your app (i18n) with camelCase, snake_case, or any format.
markdown-editor: Write, edit, and preview Markdown in real-time with syntax highlighting, live rendering, dark/light mode support, and export options. Perfect for notes, READMEs, documentation, and blog posts.
icon-generator: Generate full app icon sets for iOS and Android from one source image. AI-powered background removal for transparent icons, rotate & flip tools, modern style templates (Rounded, Squircle, Circle), upload from URL or clipboard paste, custom scales for single PNG/JPEG exports, selectable background color for JPEG, high-quality resizing & compression.
image-converter: Advanced image converter supporting modern formats: AVIF, WebP, JPEG XL (JXL), MozJPEG, PNG, and animated GIF. Full control over quality, resizing, optimization, batch processing, cross-format conversion, and combining images into a single PDF (PNG, JPG/JPEG, GIF, WebP only).
pdf-to-images: Extract high-quality images from PDF files page-by-page. Choose PNG or JPEG output, adjust resolution (72–288 DPI), JPEG quality, batch process multiple PDFs, preview pages, and download individually or as a ZIP.
ip-geolocation: Instantly retrieve geolocation data for any IP address (or your current IP). Includes city, region, country, timezone, ISP, latitude/longitude, and more. Results exportable in multiple formats (JSON, XML, YAML, etc.).
